research.title: How Qualys ETM Identity Detects Identity-Based Attacks Faster
research.summary: Key Takeaways Identity-based attacks are among the fastest and most effective intrusion methods because valid credentials let attackers operate as trusted users. Techniques like Pass-the-Hash, Kerberoasting, Domain Controller Synchronization (DCSync), and.

vulns.title: Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.
vulns.technicalSummary: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.
vulns.breakdown: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.
vulns.whatBroke: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.
vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at pssec-io/CVE-2026-34197.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/pssec-io/CVE-2026-34197
cd CVE-2026-34197
# use the repo README invocation against https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.

vulns.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller and Manager Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulns.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.
vulns.technicalSummary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller, formerly SD-WAN vSmart, and Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager, formerly SD-WAN vManage, contain an authentication bypass vulnerability could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass.

vulns.reality: Realistic when the affected product is exposed and unpatched. The updater only includes this because public tooling signal was found at anuththara2007-W/CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension.
vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/anuththara2007-W/CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension
cd CVE-2026-20127-Exploit-Extension
ruby <script>.rb --target https://<authorized-target>
